title: LuckPerms Rank Maker
description: Create LuckPerms ranks quickly and easily with chatcommands in-game.
body:
## 🔐 LPRM - Easy and quick LuckPerms rank creator. LPRM eliminates: - typing indefinitely long commands - using sites such as https://fsymbols.com, for smallcaps conversion - using sites such as https://rgb.birdflop.com, for text gradientifyment Planning actual changes soon. Stick around <: **🏳‍🌈 Happy Pride Month!**
A command *can't* crash your game (there's a specific check for it). *Unless you are using a very old version of LPRM.*
## 🪴 How to use The LPRM mod doesn't have a GUI yet. Most efficiently, you can use **the chatcommands** listed below, depending on the LPRM version you are using. ## 💬 Commands `:create {rank name} [gradient start color hex] [gradient end color hex]` - creates a new rank.
`:idcreate [rank id] {rank name} [gradient start color hex] [gradient end color hex]` - creates a new rank with the specified ID. Mainly used for modifying existing ranks, such as `default`, when you want it to be **Member**, but not recreate it.
`:grant [player] [rank id]` - grants the specified rank to the specified player.
## ❓ FAQ **What is a rank ID?**
A rank ID is given to you when creating a new rank. To get all rank IDs, do `/lp listgroups`.

**What is a color hex?**
I didn't make a color picker. To get the hex value of a color, look it up on Google. For example, by searching `hex color` in Google, you can pick a color, and then you have its HEX value shown.
